portal.no_active_popups_description: There are no active popups available at the moment. Please check back later.
portal.no_profile_contact: Please contact support if you believe this is an error.

auth.welcome_message: Welcome! Enter your email to receive a verification code.
auth.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
auth.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
auth.code_expired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
auth.failed_to_verify: Failed to verify code. Please try again.
auth.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.

form.email_invalid_format: Please enter a valid email address
form.personal_info_description: Your basic information helps us identify and contact you.

application.unavailable_description: The application form for this event is not yet configured.
application.existing_description: We've found a previous application associated with your email.
application.import_prompt: Would you like to import your previous application data? This will save you time by pre-filling the form with your existing information.
application.submitted_description: Your application has been successfully submitted.
application.submit_error_description: There was an error submitting your application. Please try again.
application.draft_saved_description: Your draft has been successfully saved.
application.draft_error_description: There was an error saving your draft. Please try again.
application.required_fields_error: Please fill in the following required fields: {{fields}}

fee.required_description: A non-refundable fee of ${{amount}} USD is required to submit your application. You will be redirected to a secure payment page.
fee.processing_description: We are confirming your payment. This may take a few moments.
fee.confirmed_description: Your application is now under review.
fee.confirmation_toast: Payment confirmed! Your application is now under review.
fee.confirmation_error: Could not confirm payment status. Please refresh the page.
fee.missing_checkout_url: Missing checkout URL for application fee payment

scholarship.details_label_fallback: Please tell us why you need financial support
scholarship.details_required_error: Please tell us why you need financial support

companions.title: Children and +1s
companions.spouse_approval: We will approve your spouse/partner if we approve you.
companions.spouse_email_help: Please provide your spouse/partner's email so we can remind them to apply.
companions.kids_approval: We will approve your kids if we approve you. Your kids do not need to fill out their own version of this form however.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.processing_subtitle: This might take a few moments
checkout.submit_error: An error occurred while submitting the form. Please try again.
checkout.application_required_message: Hi {{userName}}, before you can purchase a pass, we'd love to get to know you better!
checkout.application_required_prompt: Please visit the Edge Portal and apply to {{popupName}}, so we can review your information.
checkout.email_verification_sent: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {{email}}
checkout.resend_hint: Didn't receive the code? Check your spam folder or click "Resend Code" after the timer expires.
checkout.success_description: Thank you for your purchase. Your tickets are now ready for use.

steps.passes_subtitle: Choose passes for yourself and family members
steps.housing_subtitle: Optional: Book accommodation for your stay
steps.merch_subtitle: Optional: Pick up exclusive merch at the event
steps.patron_subtitle: Optional: Support the community with a contribution

cart.empty_description: Please go back and select some passes to continue.

passes.your_passes_description: View and manage your passes here. Need to make changes? You can switch your week closer to the event to match your plans!
passes.invoices_description: Download invoices for your approved payments
passes.invoices_will_appear: Invoices will appear here once payments are confirmed
passes.download_invoice_error: Failed to download invoice. Please try again.
passes.no_passes_yet_prefix: You do not yet have any passes for {{city}}, please go to
passes.monthly_pass_collision: You already have a monthly pass. No need to buy a day ticket.
passes.village_subtitle: Join the village for people building a brighter future.
passes.add_family_or_weeks: Add family members or more weeks
passes.waiver_acknowledge: I acknowledge the risks involved and agree to the Waiver and Release of Liability.
passes.waiver_detail: I understand that participating in this event involves inherent risks, including the possibility of injury or loss. By checking this box, I confirm that I have read and agree to the Waiver and Release of Liability, and I voluntarily accept these risks and release the organizers from any claims related to my participation.

attendees.title: Attendee Directory
attendees.description: Reach out to your friends to plan dates, find shared housing, or organize activities together. *This directory includes only the information of those who have voluntarily opted in to share their details.

checkin.title: Online Check-in for {{eventName}}
checkin.description: We are excited to welcome you and share this special time ahead. Please enter your (estimated) arrival and departure dates to help us create an amazing experience.
checkin.waiver_prompt: To complete your online check-in, you have to sign the following waiver.
checkin.waiver_confirm: I confirm I have understood and signed the waiver.
checkin.invalid_url_message: Please use the correct URL to check in.
checkin.submit_error: Error submitting check-in, please try again.
checkin.success_description: Thank you for completing your online check-in for {{eventName}}. We've recorded your arrival and departure dates.
checkin.see_you_soon: We look forward to seeing you soon!

profile.image_too_large: File is too large. Please select an image smaller than 5MB
profile.image_upload_error: Error uploading image. Please try again.
